source: Owner offer sheet - Chrix x Jessie pricing meeting 2026-07-08 (transcript)

duplicate of the UV DTF by-size ladder; zero purchasable variants (owner 2026-07-13: builders only where they belong)
duplicate of the UV DTF by-size ladder; zero purchasable variants
duplicate of glitter by-size + the Kixxl glitter builder; zero purchasable variants
duplicate of fluorescent by-size; zero purchasable variants
competitor branding in title ("Best in Virginia"), 42-inch width not offered; duplicate of 3D Puff Transfers

Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.

Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
Allow a 5-7 day lead time on decorated apparel.
UV DTF is produced through our partner press - allow a 5-7 day lead time.

dtfva-custom-dtf-transfers-by-size-virgi.shortDescription: Standard DTF transfers cut to the exact size your artwork needs — one design, one print, nothing wasted on sheet space you won't use.
dtfva-custom-dtf-transfers-by-size-virgi.bodyHtml:
This is the pick-a-size version of our standard DTF line. Small sizes handle left-chest logos and sleeve hits, while the 11" x 11" at $7.90 and the 12" x 14" at $10.40 cover full-front prints. There is no minimum order — one transfer is a perfectly good order.

To order, pick your size from the selector, set how many you need with the quantity stepper, and upload your artwork right on the page — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS files up to 50MB, or add the file later in the cart. Add to cart and pay through the standard Shopify checkout; your file rides along with the order.

These are warm peel transfers: press, wait a few seconds, and peel while the film is still warm. They go on cotton, polyester, blends, and nylon with no pretreatment. We ship anywhere in the country, and if you're near Logan, West Virginia, pickup at the shop can be arranged.

dtfva-custom-dtf-gang-sheets-30-inches.shortDescription: Eight extra inches of width over our 22-inch rolls means bigger jobs fit on fewer sheets. That's what the 30-inch gang sheet is for.
dtfva-custom-dtf-gang-sheets-30-inches.bodyHtml:
Lengths start at 12 inches for $7.04 and step up to a 240-inch roll at $159.80, with a 60-inch sheet at $39.20 and 120 inches at $79.40 along the way. The full 30.5-inch print width is yours to fill — mix sizes, mix designs, pack it tight.

Ordering is straightforward: choose your sheet length from the selector, set the quantity, and upload your finished layout right on the page — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS files up to 50MB all work, and you can also attach the file later in the cart. Check out through Shopify and the artwork travels with the order.

Because 30-inch material comes in for each job, plan on 5-7 days before the order goes out. These print as standard DTF, meaning warm peel: press, pause a few seconds, peel warm. Shipping is nationwide, and Logan, West Virginia customers can arrange a local pickup instead.

dtfva-custom-glitter-dtf-transfer-by-siz.shortDescription: Single glitter transfers sized to one design, for jobs that don't need a whole sheet of shine.
dtfva-custom-glitter-dtf-transfer-by-siz.bodyHtml:
Pick the size that matches your artwork: small hits like the 3" x 3" at $1.40, mid-range prints like the 8" x 8" at $5.90, or a full 12" x 14" at $10.40. You pay for the transfer, not the empty film around it.

Ordering happens right on this page: select your size, set the quantity, and upload your artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB, with the option to add the file in the cart instead. Then add to cart and check out through Shopify; the file stays attached to your order.

Unlike our standard warm-peel transfers, glitter must cool completely on the garment before you peel it, so give it the extra minute. Finished transfers ship anywhere in the US, with pickup available at the shop in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-sublimation-gang-sheets-bulk-print.shortDescription: Sublimation gang sheets put a whole batch of poly-ready designs on one wide run of transfer paper instead of selling you prints one at a time.
dtfva-sublimation-gang-sheets-bulk-print.bodyHtml:
You get a continuous 22.5-inch-wide sheet of sublimation paper printed with your layouts. Middle lengths land where you'd expect — 48 inches for $16, 72 inches for $24.50 — so scale the sheet to the batch you're pressing.

Ordering is all on this page: pick the paper length from the selector, set the quantity, and upload your layout — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS files up to 50MB, now or later in the cart. Add to cart and pay through Shopify checkout, and your artwork rides with the order.

Sublimation is made for polyester fabric and poly-coated blanks, not cotton. We mail sheets across the country, and pickup in Logan, West Virginia is an option if you're nearby.

dtfva-custom-sublimation-transfers-by-si.shortDescription: Order a sublimation print at exactly the size your blank calls for — a single transfer, trimmed to the job.
dtfva-custom-sublimation-transfers-by-si.bodyHtml:
The list covers square sizes from 3 inches up, plus rectangles like the 9" x 11" at $4.20 and the 11" x 14" at $6.20. Buy exactly the print you need for one mug wrap, one shirt panel, or one test press.

Ordering happens on the page itself: choose your size from the selector, set the quantity with the stepper, and upload the artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB, on the page or later in the cart. Finish through Shopify checkout and the file travels with your order.

Keep in mind these are sublimation transfers — they need polyester fabric or a poly-coated surface to work. Prints ship nationwide from our shop, and Logan, West Virginia locals can arrange to pick up instead.

dtfva-custom-fluorescent-dtf-transfers-b.shortDescription: Need a print that glows under black light? Fluorescent DTF transfers come cut to your size in colors that stay loud in daylight too.
dtfva-custom-fluorescent-dtf-transfers-b.bodyHtml:
Fourteen sizes cover everything from a 3" x 3" hit at $3.60 to a 12" x 14" front print at $17.10. If your design lands between two sizes, pick the next one up.

To order, pick the size from the selector, set the quantity, and upload your file right on the page — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB, or attach it later in the cart. Add to cart and pay through Shopify; the artwork stays with the order through production.

Allow a 5-7 day lead time before your order ships. The black-light glow makes these a natural fit for event and nightlife shirts. Shipping is nationwide, or set up a pickup at our Logan, West Virginia shop.

dtfva-upload-3d-puff-transfers.shortDescription: These 22" x 15" puff sheets turn flat artwork into prints with real height off the press.
dtfva-upload-3d-puff-transfers.bodyHtml:
Color options include black, white, red, purple, deep pink, royal blue, and silver, along with brighter picks like fluorescent yellow, light green, and light orange — 14 in all, one color per sheet. The sheet is yours to pack with a single big design or a batch of small ones.

When you're ready, pick your puff color from the selector, set how many sheets you need, and upload the artwork for your 22" x 15" layout right on the page — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB, with the option to add it in the cart instead. Check out through Shopify and the file goes into production with your order.

Once printed, your order ships nationwide from Logan, West Virginia, or you can call (304) 688-9970 to arrange a local pickup.

dtfva-uv-dtf-transfer-by-size.shortDescription: UV DTF transfers are permanent, stick-on prints for hard, smooth surfaces — tumblers, glass, metal, coolers. They are not garment transfers; for shirts, use our standard DTF.
dtfva-uv-dtf-transfer-by-size.bodyHtml:
Twenty-five lengths on the 22-inch roll, from 22" x 12" at $12 up to 22" x 300" at $300, moving in 12-inch steps. Pick the length that fits your artwork or your batch.

Ordering happens right on this page: choose your length, upload your artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB — add to cart, and pay through checkout. The file travels with your order, and if you skip the upload here, you can add it in the cart.

UV DTF runs through our partner press, so allow a 5-7 day lead time. Once applied, the adhesive is permanent, so pick your surface like you mean it. We ship nationwide, or you can arrange pickup in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-dye-cut-stickers.shortDescription: Custom stickers of your design, sold the way shops actually use them — a hundred at a time, cut to the shape you want.
dtfva-dye-cut-stickers.bodyHtml:
Each pack is 100 three-inch stickers of your design, cut round, square, or die-cut to the outline of your art — the shape does not change the $30 price. There are no one-off stickers here; the 100-pack is the only unit we sell.

Order straight from this page: pick your cut, upload your art file — we take PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, and EPS up to 50MB — add to cart, and check out. Your artwork rides along with the order so nothing gets lost between payment and print.

We ship packs nationwide, or if you are local, pickup in Logan, West Virginia is easy to arrange — call (304) 688-9970 to set it up.

dtfva-uv-printed-custom-leather-patches.shortDescription: If you put patches on hats, start here: UV-printed leather, laser-cut to shape, ready to press or stick on.
dtfva-uv-printed-custom-leather-patches.bodyHtml:
The full sheet is 12" x 24" and yields about 30 patches, depending on the size and shape you pick — plan on a maximum of two to three designs per sheet. If you just need a handful, single patches are $4 each plus shipping; the $75 sheet is the better math once you need real quantity.

Upload your patch artwork right here on the product page, choose full sheet or single patch, add it to the cart, and pay through checkout. If you forget the file, there is a second upload spot inside the cart.

Patches arrive UV-printed and laser-cut, ready to press or stick onto hats — no trimming on your end. We ship nationwide and can set up local pickup in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-uv-printed-custom-tpu-patches.shortDescription: Need a patch that is not leather? These are UV-printed on TPU stock in five colors, from plain white to glittery gold.
dtfva-uv-printed-custom-tpu-patches.bodyHtml:
Six sizes, each at one price across all five colors: 1" x 1" at $0.65, 2" x 2" at $2.60, 3" x 3" at $5.85, 4" x 4" at $10.40, 5" x 5" at $16.25, and 6" x 6" at $23.40. Color choices are white, silver, gold, glittery silver, and glittery gold.

Ordering is direct from this page: pick your size-and-color combination from the selector, set the quantity, and upload your artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS files up to 50MB, on the page or later in the cart. Pay through the regular Shopify checkout and the file follows the order.

Shipping is nationwide, and pickup in Logan, West Virginia is available if you would rather grab them in person.

dtfva-america-s-250th-anniversary-patch-.shortDescription: A one-inch circle patch marking America's 250th anniversary — small enough for hats, collars, and other tight placements.
dtfva-america-s-250th-anniversary-patch-.bodyHtml:
One design, one size: a 1" x 1" circle at $0.98 per patch, made for the 250th anniversary year.

This one is quoted rather than bought off the page. Send your quantity and any details through the contact form, and the shop comes back with setup and pricing for your run.

Finished patches ship nationwide, or you can pick them up at the shop in Logan, West Virginia. Questions before you send the form? Call (304) 688-9970.

dtfva-custom-woven-labels.shortDescription: Every product you make can carry your brand — these UV-printed labels put your name on garments, bags, and handmade goods.
dtfva-custom-woven-labels.bodyHtml:
Ten sizes cover most tag jobs: the 1" x 1" runs $0.98, the 2" x 2" is $0.68, 3" x 3" is $2.78, 4" x 4" is $5.72, and the largest 6" x 6" is $14.12, with rectangle options like 2" x 3" ($1.52) and 4" x 6" ($9.08) in between. Each label is UV-printed with your artwork.

Buy them straight from this page: select a size, attach your art — vector files like AI and EPS work, and so do PNG, JPG, and PDF up to 50MB — then add to cart and check out. The upload stays attached to your order through production.

Labels ship nationwide from Logan, West Virginia, and local pickup can be arranged if you are in the area.

dtfva-party-banners.shortDescription: Graduations, birthdays, welcome-homes, team send-offs — a printed banner puts the name of the day up where the whole room can see it. Send us your design and we print it here in the shop.
dtfva-party-banners.bodyHtml:
The 24" x 36" at $30 is the right call for a mantel, a doorway, or behind the cake table. The 48" x 72" at $100 covers a garage door, a fence line, or a gym wall. If the spot you're decorating needs something in between or bigger, send the dimensions through the contact form and we'll price it out.

Ordering is all on this page. Pick your size, upload the artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB — add it to the cart, and pay through checkout. Your file stays attached to the order, so what you send is what we print. Forgot to attach it? There's an upload spot in the cart too.

Banners ship nationwide from Logan, West Virginia, and if you're local you can arrange to swing by the shop and grab yours. Questions before you order, call (304) 688-9970.

dtfva-indoor-floor-graphics.shortDescription: Floor space is signage space. These graphics turn the walkway in front of your register, booth, or entrance into a spot for directions, promos, or your logo.
dtfva-indoor-floor-graphics.bodyHtml:
Small markers like the 6" x 6" at $10.54 or 8" x 8" at $11.49 work as spacing dots and directional arrows. Mid-range pieces — 12" x 12" at $14.03, 18" x 18" at $23.00, 18" x 24" at $26.75 — carry a logo or a short message. Long formats like the 10" x 30" at $22.15 and 12" x 48" at $31.93 run as aisle strips, and the 24" x 36" at $44.44 or 36" x 36" at $63.45 make a full floor centerpiece.

You order straight from this page: choose the size, attach your art file (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, 50MB max), add to cart, and check out. The artwork travels with the order so nothing gets lost between you and the press. If you skip the upload here, you can still add the file inside the cart.

These are made for indoor floors — keep them out of the weather. We ship anywhere in the country, and Logan, West Virginia locals can arrange pickup at the shop instead.

dtfva-window-clings.shortDescription: A cling holds to glass without permanent adhesive, so it goes up for the promotion and comes back down when it's over. Good for storefront windows, glass doors, and any smooth pane that changes messages with the season.
dtfva-window-clings.bodyHtml:
Sizes run from small accents — 4" x 4" at $7.49, 6" x 6" at $8.59 — through flyer formats like 8.5" x 11" at $11.39 and 11" x 17" at $15.89 that fit right where a paper sign would go. Door-scale options include the 12" x 24" at $20.79 and 18" x 24" at $27.69, and full storefront pieces like the 24" x 36" at $48.49, 24" x 48" at $62.39, and 36" x 48" at $90.19 fill serious glass.

This page handles the whole order. Select a size, drop in your artwork — we take PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS files up to 50MB — then add to cart and pay at checkout. The file rides along with the order, and there's a second upload option in the cart if you need it.

Every order ships nationwide out of Logan, West Virginia; pickup at the shop can be set up if you're nearby.

dtfva-custom-window-graphics.shortDescription: Your storefront glass works every hour you're closed. Printed window graphics put hours, branding, or a full promo in front of the foot traffic that's already walking past.
dtfva-custom-window-graphics.bodyHtml:
At the small end, a 4" x 4" runs $7.65 and a 6" x 6" is $8.43 — right for a logo mark or hours block. The 12" x 24" at $18.19 and 18" x 24" at $23.77 suit a door panel, while the 24" x 36" at $40.52 and 30" x 40" at $53.54 handle a display window. Going big, the 36" x 60" is $90.75 and the 48" x 72" tops the range at $140.98 for a full pane.

To order, pick the size that matches your glass, upload the design right on this page (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB), add it to your cart, and run it through checkout. Your artwork stays tied to the order the whole way. Missed the upload? The cart takes files too.

Nationwide shipping is standard, and pickup in Logan, West Virginia is an option if you're close. Not sure which size fits your window, measure the glass and call us at (304) 688-9970 before you order.

dtfva-perforated-window-vinyl.shortDescription: Window perf covers the outside of the glass with your full graphic while the perforations keep the view from inside. It's how a storefront window becomes a billboard without going dark behind it.
dtfva-perforated-window-vinyl.bodyHtml:
Start small if you want to see the material first — the 5" x 5" is $1.00 and the 6" x 6" is $1.88, cheap enough to test before committing. Working sizes step up from there: 12" x 24" at $22.04, 18" x 24" at $33.56, and 24" x 36" at $68.12. For covering real glass, the 36" x 48" runs $137.24, the 36" x 60" is $171.80, and the full 48" x 72" panel is $275.48.

Everything happens on this page: size, artwork upload, cart, checkout. We accept PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, and EPS files up to 50MB, and the file is attached to your order so the print matches what you sent. The cart has its own upload field as a backup.

Panels ship anywhere in the US from our shop in Logan, West Virginia, or you can arrange local pickup. If your window doesn't match a listed size, send the measurements through the contact form and we'll quote it.

dtfva-gildan-64000.shortDescription: The Gildan Softstyle is the workhorse blank of custom shirt runs — a plain unisex tee you can order in five colors with your artwork attached.
dtfva-gildan-64000.bodyHtml:
You're buying the blank shirt here: Black, White, Navy, Sport Grey, or Dark Heather, sizes S through 5XL. Small starts at $11 and each size up adds a dollar, topping out at $18 for 5XL.

Ordering happens on this page. Choose size and color, upload your artwork — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB — add to cart, and pay through the normal Shopify checkout. The file stays attached to your order, and there's a second upload spot in the cart if you skipped it here.

We don't keep garments on the shelf; blanks are ordered in for each job, so allow 5-7 days. Orders ship anywhere in the country, or you can pick up at the shop in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-bella-canvas-3001.shortDescription: The BELLA+CANVAS 3001 is a unisex jersey tee for merch where the garment matters as much as the print. Six colors, and it orders straight from this page.
dtfva-bella-canvas-3001.bodyHtml:
Six colors on the menu: Black, White, Natural, Navy, Dark Grey, and Military Green. Each size step adds a dollar — $14 at XS through $18 at XL — and larger sizes show up in the size picker where available.

Ordering happens without leaving the page: choose size and color, attach your design in the uploader — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50MB — then add to cart and check out. The file stays tied to your order, and the cart has its own upload slot if you skip it here.

Apparel carries a 5-7 day lead time across the board, since shirts are brought in fresh for every order instead of pulled from a shelf. Finished tees ship nationwide, and Logan, West Virginia pickup is easy to set up.

dtfva-next-level-3600.shortDescription: Next Level's 3600 is a cotton crew tee we decorate to order for teams, events, and small brands.
dtfva-next-level-3600.bodyHtml:
Color options run Black, White, Heather Grey, Midnight Navy, Graphite Black, and Military Green. Blank pricing moves a dollar a step: $13 XS, $14 small, $15 medium, $16 large, $17 XL.

Decoration is priced per job. Route the details through the contact form — artwork, quantity, size and color breakdown — and we'll answer with setup and pricing for the run.

Give it 5-7 days; we order the blanks in for each job rather than keeping stock. When it's done we ship anywhere in the country, or hold the order for pickup here in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-custom-los-angeles-apparel-1865gd-.shortDescription: Garment-dyed, sleeveless, and cut by Los Angeles Apparel, the 1865GD covers the warm-weather end of a merch line.
dtfva-custom-los-angeles-apparel-1865gd-.bodyHtml:
Five garment-dye colors: Vintage Black, Black Edge, Dolphin Blue, Off White, and White. Sizes run S through 2XL, priced from $29 up to $33 — one dollar more each size.

To order, pick a size and color, attach your art file right here (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS under 50MB all work), add it to the cart, and run the standard checkout. Miss the upload? The cart gives you another chance to attach the file.

Because garments are ordered per job rather than stocked, figure on a 5-7 day turnaround. We ship these anywhere in the US, and local pickup in Logan, West Virginia can be arranged.

dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-drop-shoulder-cr.shortDescription: Not every merch line wants a standard tee. This drop-shoulder cropped blank from Shaka Wear is built for the streetwear side of an order.
dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-drop-shoulder-cr.bodyHtml:
Four colorways — Black, Off Black, White, and Off White — in sizes S through 2XL. The blank runs $29 in small and adds a dollar per size, ending at $33 for 2XL.

Printing on this cut is quoted per job. Use the contact form to send the design, quantity, and size split; the shop replies with setup and a firm price.

Give it 5-7 days once the order is set — these blanks are purchased for your run, not pulled from inventory. Shipping covers the whole country, with pickup available in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-max-heavyweight-.shortDescription: When the job calls for a heavyweight tee, Shaka Wear's Max is the blank we quote it on.
dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-max-heavyweight-.bodyHtml:
Nineteen colors, from staples like Black, White, Navy, and Heather Grey to Gold, Turquoise, Kelly Green, and Cardinal. Blanks start at $29 for a small, and each size up costs a dollar more — a medium is $30.

Decoration gets quoted per job on this shirt. Hit the contact form with artwork, sizes, and how many you need, and we'll write the job up with setup and pricing.

Lead time on all apparel is 5-7 days here since garments are ordered per job. Finished runs ship nationwide; if you're nearby, pickup in Logan, West Virginia works too.

dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-ref.shortDescription: For crewneck orders we run American Apparel's ReFlex fleece, the RF496 — a pullover sweatshirt blank offered in ten colors.
dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-ref.bodyHtml:
Ten colors cover most brand palettes: White, Black, Arctic, Asphalt, Blush, Bone, Brown, Heather Grey, Lieutenant, and Sea Blue. The blank starts at $34 in XS and adds a dollar every size up — $35 small, $36 medium, and so on.

Decorated crewnecks get quoted as a package: send the design and quantities through the contact form and you'll hear back with setup and a firm number for the whole job.

Plan on 5-7 days of production — the sweatshirts come in once your order is confirmed. Completed orders ship nationwide, or you can collect them at the shop in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-hea.shortDescription: This one handles the cold-weather requests: American Apparel's heavyweight cotton long sleeve, quoted and printed to your design.
dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-hea.bodyHtml:
Seven colors: Black, White, Heather Grey, Celadon, Orange, Sand, and True Navy. Pricing steps from $34 at small to $38 at 2XL, a dollar per jump.

Quotes for printing go through the contact form. Share the artwork, size breakdown, and count, and the shop will answer with setup and pricing built for your quantity.

Production takes 5-7 days once the job is locked in, since the shirts are ordered per job rather than stocked. Everything ships nationwide, or swing by Logan, West Virginia to grab it in person.

dtfva-custom-heavy-fleece-hoodie-sweatsh.shortDescription: Heavy fleece with retail-blank construction — this hoodie is the heavyweight of our apparel lineup, decorated to order.
dtfva-custom-heavy-fleece-hoodie-sweatsh.bodyHtml:
Six colors: Black, Asphalt, Bone, Heather Grey, Lieutenant, and Sea Blue. An XS blank is $44, with a dollar added per size — XL lands at $48.

Decorated hoodies are priced by quote. Route the details through the contact form — design, quantities, sizes — or call (304) 688-9970 and talk it through; either way you'll get setup and pricing back.

Hoodies follow the same rule as the rest of our apparel: 5-7 day lead time, because nothing sits in stock and blanks are bought per job. Orders ship across the country, and pickup can be set up in Logan, West Virginia.

dtfva-custom-softballs.shortDescription: Team photos, player names, and logos, UV-printed right on the ball. A custom softball makes a solid senior-night gift, coach's thank-you, or end-of-season keepsake.
dtfva-custom-softballs.bodyHtml:
Send us the art and we UV-print it directly on the softball at the shop in Logan, West Virginia. One ball costs $25.99; three run $68.99 — player, coach, trophy case.

Order from this page: upload the design (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB), pick single or set of three, add to cart, and pay at checkout. The file stays attached to the order, and there's a second upload spot in the cart if you miss it here.

All the printing is done in-house. Orders ship nationwide, and if you're nearby, local pickup in Logan, WV can be arranged — call (304) 688-9970 to set it up.

dtfva-custom-baseballs.shortDescription: Baseballs printed with your own artwork — a team logo, a jersey number, a photo from the season. Made for coach gifts, tournament keepsakes, and the display shelf.
dtfva-custom-baseballs.bodyHtml:
A single printed baseball is $23.99, and the three-pack is $63.99 when one gift won't cut it. Your design goes on by UV print, so what you upload is what shows up on the ball.

To order, use the upload box on this page. We take PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, and EPS files up to 50MB. Pick your quantity, add to cart, and check out — the artwork travels with the order automatically.

Printing happens in-house here in Logan, West Virginia. We ship nationwide, or you can pick the order up locally instead.

dtfva-custom-hockey-pucks.shortDescription: Put your logo on the puck itself. We UV-print hockey pucks with whatever design you send — team crests, sponsor marks, tournament art.
dtfva-custom-hockey-pucks.bodyHtml:
Single pucks go for $18.99; the set of three is $48.99. UV printing lays the design right on the puck in full color — good for team awards, sponsor giveaways, and league souvenirs.

This page handles the whole order. Choose single or set of three, drop in your art file (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, 50MB max), and pay through checkout. If you'd rather attach the file later, the cart takes uploads too.

Pucks go out nationwide from the Logan, West Virginia shop, with local pickup available if you'd rather grab them in person.

dtfva-custom-pickleballs.shortDescription: Whether it's a club logo, a league name, or an inside joke, we print it straight onto the pickleball. Good for prizes, gifts, and events where a plain ball won't cut it.
dtfva-custom-pickleballs.bodyHtml:
Buy a single ball at $15.99, three for $38.99, or six for $68.99 — the six-pack is the practical pick for club events and round-robin prizes.

Everything runs through this page: pick a quantity, upload the design in PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS format (up to 50MB), and check out. Your file is tied to the order the moment you buy.

Like the rest of our sports gear, pickleballs are UV-printed in-house in Logan, West Virginia. Orders ship anywhere in the country, and local pickup in Logan, WV is an option if you'd rather swing by.

dtfva-personalized-tumblers.shortDescription: A 20 oz tumbler carrying your design, sublimated so the artwork becomes part of the surface instead of a sticker sitting on top. Make it a name, a monogram, a logo, or a photo.
dtfva-personalized-tumblers.bodyHtml:
Each tumbler holds 20 oz, and the print template measures 240mm x 204mm, so there's real room to work with. At $19 apiece, they fit single gifts as easily as a batch for the whole bridal party or crew.

Upload your artwork right here — PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB — add the tumbler to the cart, and check out. The file stays linked to your order, so we print exactly what you sent.

Tumblers ship nationwide. If you're near Logan, West Virginia, call (304) 688-9970 and we can set up local pickup instead.

dtfva-rush-fee.shortDescription: Sometimes the calendar wins and a job has to jump the line. This is the fee that makes that happen — one flat charge to expedite your printing.
dtfva-rush-fee.bodyHtml:
This is a flat $50 charge that expedites one job. It covers the shop bumping your order ahead of the standard schedule — nothing else changes about the products you ordered.

To use it, add the rush fee to your cart alongside the items it covers and pay through Shopify checkout. Already placed your order? Buy the fee on its own, then call (304) 688-9970 so the shop can match it to the right job.

Two honest caveats. Some products carry built-in lead times — 30-inch gang sheets run 5-7 days because material is ordered per job, apparel and fluorescent DTF each carry a 5-7 day lead time, and large-format UV DTF runs go through a partner press on a similar schedule — so call before paying if your job falls in one of those buckets. And the fee speeds up printing, not the carrier: if you're near Logan, West Virginia, pickup can be arranged and skips shipping altogether.

dtfva-professional-vector-design-service.shortDescription: Fuzzy logos and screenshot art don't press well. Send over the file you have and get it rebuilt as sharp, print-ready vector artwork.
dtfva-professional-vector-design-service.bodyHtml:
Vector art keeps its edges crisp at any size, which is exactly what a good print needs. For $10 a design, the shop takes whatever you've got — a low-res JPG, a pixelated logo, a photo of an old shirt — and redraws it as clean vector artwork ready for production.

Ordering happens right on this page. Upload your current file (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB), set the quantity to match how many designs need redrawing, add to cart, and pay through Shopify checkout. The file rides along with your order, and you can also attach it from the cart if you skipped the upload here.

Putting transfers in the same cart? Do it — the redrawn art can go straight onto your print job. Not sure a file can be salvaged? Call the shop at (304) 688-9970 and ask.

dtfva-brand-starter-pack.shortDescription: The entry point of Hatfield McCoy DTF's three branding kits, built for a brand that's ready to put its name on real printed goods for the first time.
dtfva-brand-starter-pack.bodyHtml:
Here's the deal: the price is locked at $298, and the contents are tailored to your brand. Rather than a fixed menu, the shop works out what gets printed — and in what sizes and quantities — with you before production begins.

Start by sending your details through the contact form: business name, your logo or the idea for one, and what you're hoping the kit covers. The shop replies with the setup — what your $298 buys — and confirms the plan with you before production starts. If your logo only exists as a blurry image, the $10 vector redraw service can clean it up first.

The kit comes out of Hatfield McCoy DTF in Logan, West Virginia. Finished work ships nationwide, and local pickup in Logan can be arranged if you're close.

dtfva-brand-growth-pack.shortDescription: Middle kit of the three branding bundles — for a brand that's past its first print run and wants more coverage than the Starter Pack carries.
dtfva-brand-growth-pack.bodyHtml:
The price is a flat $598, and it doesn't move; what fills the bundle does. The shop scopes the kit to your brand instead of handing everyone the same box.

Kick it off through the contact form: tell the shop who you are, share your artwork, and describe where the brand is headed. You'll get a reply laying out what the Growth Pack will include for you, and the job doesn't move until you approve it.

Orders ship anywhere in the country from Logan, West Virginia, and if you're in the area, pickup can be arranged.

dtfva-brand-business-pack.shortDescription: Top of the branding-kit lineup, sized for a business that treats merch as part of the operation rather than a side project.
dtfva-brand-business-pack.bodyHtml:
This is the largest of the three kits, priced at a flat $798. Like the others, it's a fixed-price bundle: you know the number up front, and the quote nails down what the bundle holds for your specific brand.

Getting started means the contact form. Lay out your business, attach your brand artwork, and note anything specific you want covered. The shop comes back with the full scope of your kit, and work begins once you've signed off.

Hatfield McCoy DTF runs out of Logan, West Virginia and ships nationwide; local pickup in Logan can be set up if that's easier. For a conversation before the form, the number is (304) 688-9970.

offerCopy.dtfva-uv-printed-custom-leather-patches: Two ways to buy: a full 12" x 24" sheet — about 30 patches, up to 3 designs — for $75, or single patches at $4 each plus shipping.
offerCopy.dtfva-party-banners: Two sizes, printed in-shop: 24" x 36" for $30, or the big 48" x 72" for $100. Need a different size? Request a quote.
offerCopy.dtfva-dye-cut-stickers: 100 three-inch stickers for $30 — round, square, or die-cut, same price. Sold by the 100-pack only.
offerCopy.dtfva-uv-dtf-transfer-by-size: $1 per inch of length on the 22" roll — from $12 for 22" x 12" up to $300 for a full 22" x 300" run.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-fluorescent-dtf-transfers-b: Priced by size, from $2.10 for 2" x 2" to $21.60 for 12" x 17" — every size and price is in the table below.
offerCopy.dtfva-uv-printed-custom-tpu-patches: Priced by size and color — from $0.65 for a 1" patch to $23.40 for 6" x 6". All 30 combinations are listed below.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-softballs: One custom softball for $25.99, or a set of three for $68.99.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-baseballs: One custom baseball for $23.99, or a set of three for $63.99.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-hockey-pucks: One custom hockey puck for $18.99, or a set of three for $48.99.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-pickleballs: One pickleball for $15.99, a set of three for $38.99, or a set of six for $68.99.
offerCopy.dtfva-personalized-tumblers: Personalized 20 oz tumbler — $19 each, your design sublimated on.
offerCopy.dtfva-rush-fee: Flat $50 rush fee for same-day or expedited printing on an existing order.
offerCopy.dtfva-professional-vector-design-service: $10 per design — redrawn as clean vector art, usually back within 24 hours.
offerCopy.dtfva-gildan-64000: Blank Gildan Softstyle tees from $11 (S) to $18 (5XL) in five colors — add your transfer with a 5-7 day lead time.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-dtf-gang-sheets-30-inches: 30-inch-wide gang sheets priced by length — every length and price is in the table below. Allow 5-7 days; 30" material is ordered per job.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-dtf-transfers-by-size-virgi: Every transfer is priced by its size: $0.40 for a 2" x 2", $2.90 for a 5" x 5", $7.40 for a 10" x 10", up to $13.40 for a 12" x 17", with the full size list right on the page.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-glitter-dtf-transfer-by-siz: Fourteen set sizes, each with its own price — $0.40 for a 2" x 2", $3.90 for a 6" x 6", $7.40 for a 10" x 10", topping out at $13.40 for a 12" x 17".
offerCopy.dtfva-sublimation-gang-sheets-bulk-print: Nine paper lengths on the 22.5-inch roll, from $7.50 for 22.5" x 24" up to $41.50 for 22.5" x 120", every one of them listed right on the page.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-sublimation-transfers-by-si: Sizes and prices run from $0.30 for a 3" x 3" through $1.80 for a 6" x 6" up to $8.60 for a 12" x 17", all listed in the size menu on this page.
offerCopy.dtfva-upload-3d-puff-transfers: Flat pricing at $13.99 per 22" x 15" sheet, in any one of 14 puff colors — plain white and black through fluorescent yellow.
offerCopy.dtfva-america-s-250th-anniversary-patch-: The 1" x 1" circle patch runs $0.98 each — send your quantity and details through the contact form and the shop will reply with setup and pricing.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-woven-labels: Ten sizes, priced per label — $0.98 for 1" x 1", $0.68 for 2" x 2", on up to $14.12 for 6" x 6".
offerCopy.dtfva-indoor-floor-graphics: Sold as individual graphics in fifteen sizes, from a 6" x 6" at $10.54 up to a 36" x 36" at $63.45.
offerCopy.dtfva-window-clings: Priced per cling in fourteen sizes, starting at $7.49 for a 4" x 4" and topping out at $90.19 for a 36" x 48".
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-window-graphics: Choose from sixteen sizes, from a 4" x 4" graphic at $7.65 to a full 48" x 72" panel at $140.98.
offerCopy.dtfva-perforated-window-vinyl: Sold by the panel in fifteen sizes, from a 5" x 5" at $1.00 up to a 48" x 72" at $275.48.
offerCopy.dtfva-bella-canvas-3001: Pick a size and color right on this page — a blank 3001 runs $14 in XS, $15 small, $16 medium, $17 large, and $18 in XL, in any of six colors.
offerCopy.dtfva-next-level-3600: A blank tee runs $13 in XS and tops out at $17 in XL, six colors to choose from; decorated runs are quoted per job through the contact form.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-los-angeles-apparel-1865gd-: Blank sleeveless tees run $29 (S) through $33 (2XL) in five garment-dye colors, ordered with your artwork uploaded on this page.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-drop-shoulder-cr: The blank tee is $29 in small up to $33 in 2XL across four colors; printing is quoted per job.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-shaka-wear-max-heavyweight-: Nineteen colors of blanks, $29 for a small with a dollar added each size up ($30 in medium); decoration is quoted per job.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-ref: Blank pricing climbs a dollar per size from $34 at XS across ten colors; for decorated crewnecks, ask for a quote through the contact form.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-american-apparel-unisex-hea: A small blank is $34 and each size adds a dollar ($38 at 2XL) across seven colors; print pricing comes by quote.
offerCopy.dtfva-custom-heavy-fleece-hoodie-sweatsh: Blank hoodies run from $44 in XS, a dollar more per size ($48 at XL), in six colors — decorated runs are priced by quote.
offerCopy.dtfva-brand-starter-pack: Sold as one fixed-price bundle at $298, with exactly what goes in it settled by quote before anything prints.
offerCopy.dtfva-brand-growth-pack: One flat price of $598 buys the full Growth Pack, and the exact lineup inside it gets settled by quote.
offerCopy.dtfva-brand-business-pack: The whole Business Pack runs a fixed $798, with its contents finalized through the quote process.
